design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Precision Platformer through its core platformer loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Combat pacing should match genre tempo and readable threat language.
constraints: Signature mechanics must reinforce genre fantasy
gdd_outline.core_loop: Retry short platforming challenges, refine jump and dash timing, reach checkpoints, and clear gauntlet stages or rooms with minimal friction between attempts.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Tune earn/spend to genre tension targets.
gdd_outline.overview: Precision platformers center on tight movement controls, short lethal hazards, and learn-by-doing level chunks. Failure is frequent but recovery is fast, training muscle memory.
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Follow signature mechanic dependencies across early, mid, and late phases.

mechanics.expression: Snappy acceleration, jump height, and coyote time define feel.
mechanics.map_notes: Snappy acceleration, jump height, and coyote time define feel.

mechanics.expression: Spikes, pits, and moving hazards demand exact routes.
mechanics.map_notes: Spikes, pits, and moving hazards demand exact routes.

mechanics.expression: Frequent checkpoints reduce frustration while preserving challenge.
mechanics.map_notes: Frequent checkpoints reduce frustration while preserving challenge.

mechanics.expression: Instant respawn or limited lives tune difficulty curve.
mechanics.map_notes: Instant respawn or limited lives tune difficulty curve.

mechanics.expression: Optional assists broaden audience without removing core challenge.
mechanics.map_notes: Optional assists broaden audience without removing core challenge.

mechanics.expression: Secret rooms and B-side tracks reward mastery.
mechanics.map_notes: Secret rooms and B-side tracks reward mastery.

narrative.core_loop: Retry short platforming challenges, refine jump and dash timing, reach checkpoints, and clear gauntlet stages or rooms with minimal friction between attempts.
narrative.description: Precision platformers center on tight movement controls, short lethal hazards, and learn-by-doing level chunks. Failure is frequent but recovery is fast, training muscle memory.

pacing.early: Teach precision platforming with low failure cost.
pacing.late: Test full signature loop mastery under peak constraints.
pacing.mid: Combine supporting mechanics and raise resource or pattern pressure.

variants.label: Hardcore Precision Platformer
variants.notes: Tighter economy and higher failure cost for experienced players.
